# Drops Airdrop Checker API: Real‑Time Airdrop Data for Crypto Wallets

Integrate Drops Airdrop Checker Developer API to power your app with real time airdrop analytics and eligibility status for any crypto wallet address. [See full documentation](https://drops-4.gitbook.io/drops-docs)

### What is Drops?

Drops Bot is a real‑time airdrop checker that monitors every major chain for airdrop events tied to your wallet. It highlights claimable tokens, missed opportunities, and already‑claimed airdrops and rewards.

### Why integrate the Drops Airdrop Checker REST API?

With one REST API you get full coverage for every airdrop across 8 networks like Ethereum, any Layer 2 chain, Solana and SUI. The API returns clean JSON detailing every pending, claimable, and historical airdrop for any address. Ideal for dashboards, wallets, and analytics pipelines.

#### What you can build with the Drops API:

-   Add airdrop discovery to crypto wallets, portfolio apps, and dashboards
-   Power notifications when new airdrops and rewards become claimable
-   Embed “claim status” widgets on address pages, explorers, and in app screens
-   Build your own wallet checker, bot, or analytics product on top of Drops data

### API Features

#### Everything you need to ship airdrop data in production, plus tooling to manage it.

-   Multi chain coverage: one integration for airdrops on: Ethereum & L2, Solana, Cosmos, Sui, Aptos, Starknet, Bitcoin, TON
-   Clear wallet status data: missed, claimed, and claimable airdrop results you can display in app
-   Admin dashboard: track requests, usage by API key, and view recent logs
-   Credits and billing controls: buy credits, monitor remaining balance, and track spend over time
-   Developer friendly access: API keys, easy onboarding, and predictable responses for apps and bots

![API Admin Dashboard - Credits Management](/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fapi%2Fadmin-page-credits.png&w=640&q=75)Enlarge Image: API Admin Dashboard - Credits Management![API Admin Dashboard - Spending Analytics](/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fapi%2Fadmin-page-spending.png&w=640&q=75)Enlarge Image: API Admin Dashboard - Spending Analytics

### Trusted by Leading Platforms

The Drops API is trusted by industry-leading platforms including [Solscan](https://solscan.io/?utm_source=drops.bot), [Blockscout](https://www.blockscout.com/?utm_source=drops.bot), [Nightly Wallet](https://nightly.app/?utm_source=drops.bot), and others. These platforms rely on our API to provide their users with accurate, real-time airdrop data across multiple blockchain networks.

### Get Access / Contact Us

To request access, DM [@DropsBot](https://x.com/DropsBot) on X, or email api@drops.bot. Include your project name, expected request volume, and the networks you need. We'll reply within 24 h.

### Drops

Crypto airdrop checker for all wallets. Check eligibility across all networks including Ethereum, Solana, Base and Sui. Get Telegram alerts for new airdrops. Find unclaimed airdrops and what to farm next.

### 14 new airdrops added to the checker in the past month. Latest one added just 5 hours ago.

[Talk to the Telegram bot](https://t.me/DropsDotBot)[Follow us on X.com](https://x.com/DropsBot)[Follow us on Farcaster](https://farcaster.xyz/dropsdotbot.eth)[Check out our GitHub](https://github.com/dropsdotbot)[![](/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Fmirrorxyz.png&w=32&q=75)Articles on Mirror.xyz](https://mirror.xyz/0x433Bf07BBe1Ea1be34E95d30b2D84603EEe1D633)[Articles on Medium](https://medium.com/@dropsdotbot)
